confirm_close.title: 下载进行中
confirm_close.message: 您有 {{count}} 个活动下载。立即关闭将会取消它们。

legal.title: 请负责任地使用 OmniGet
legal.body_paragraph_1: OmniGet 是用于下载您有权访问的媒体的工具。您有责任尊重您下载的每个平台的版权和服务条款。
legal.rule_copyright: 我只会下载我拥有、有许可或明确允许再利用的内容。
legal.rule_tos: 我会遵守来源平台的服务条款。
legal.rule_personal_use: 我理解此工具按原样提供，维护者不对滥用行为负责。

recovery.title: 未完成的下载
recovery.message: OmniGet 发现上一次会话有 {{count}} 个下载未完成。是否要恢复？

tools.metadata_desc: 不下载视频本身，仅保存视频的信息、简介和缩略图。
tools.thumbnails_desc: 浏览所有可用封面图，并以任意分辨率保存。
tools.subs_desc: 下载字幕，或将两种语言合并为一个双语文件。
tools.subs_merge_hint: 请选择第二语言；合并需要 SRT 或 VTT。
tools.cc_desc: 获取视频的评论或章节标记，进行筛选并导出为 JSON 或 CSV。
tools.cc_none: 该链接未找到任何内容。
tools.lc_desc: 获取已结束直播的聊天回放，进行筛选并导出为 JSON 或 CSV。

downloads.title: 下载
downloads.clear_confirm: 清除所有已完成的下载？
downloads.history_clear_confirm: 清除全部下载历史？已下载的文件不会被删除。
downloads.delete_file_confirm: 永久从磁盘删除已下载的文件？此操作无法撤销。

sw.title: 字幕工作室
sw.tool_desc: 打开、编辑时间/文本、翻译并保存 SRT/VTT 字幕。
sw.autofixed: 已自动修复 {{count}} 个字幕提示
sw.grammar_mismatch: 语法修复未对齐 — 请重试
sw.tp_invalid: 两个锚点时间必须不同
sw.translate_mismatch: 翻译未对齐 — 请重试
sw.not_configured: 请先在设置中配置 AI 提供方
sw.empty: 打开 SRT 或 VTT 文件以开始。

vop.title: AI 视频工具
vop.not_configured: 请先在设置中配置 AI 提供方
vop.review_hint: 应用会填入输入/输出。仅在你确认后执行。

downloads.quality_hint: 正在为此项下载的质量

toast.download_complete: 完成！{{name}} 已保存到你的文件夹
toast.clipboard_url_detected: 检测到链接！粘贴即可下载
toast.external_url_ready: 已收到 URL，可以开始下载
toast.external_url_queued: 已从 Chrome 扩展添加下载
toast.drm_skipped: {{count}} 个视频已跳过 — 受DRM保护（FairPlay/SAMPLE-AES）

reencode.title: 重新编码视频
reencode.codec_hevc_desc: 质量与文件大小的最佳平衡。可在大多数现代设备播放。
reencode.codec_h264_desc: 兼容性最佳。处处可播放，但文件更大。
reencode.codec_av1_desc: 文件最小，编码最慢。设备支持时，最适合存储。
reencode.replace_desc: 若新文件更小，则替换原始文件。成功后原始文件被删除。
reencode.toast_replaced: 已替换原始文件。使用 {{encoder}} 节省 {{saved}}（{{pct}}%）

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.code_hint: 验证码已发送到您的 Telegram 应用
telegram.no_media: 该对话中未找到媒体文件。
telegram.qr_instruction: 打开手机上的 Telegram，前往 设置 > 设备 > 关联桌面设备

general.title: 通用
general.start_with_system_desc: 系统启动时自动运行 OmniGet
general.start_minimized_desc: 在系统托盘中打开 OmniGet 而不显示窗口。点击托盘图标打开。
general.reset_hints_desc: 重新显示所有已关闭的提示

download.path_too_long: 此文件夹路径过长（{{current}}/{{limit}} 个字符）。文件名较长时下载可能失败 — 请选择更短的文件夹。
download.always_ask_path_desc: 每次下载都显示保存对话框。
download.video_quality_desc: 未在输入框选择质量时的默认值。
download.speed_limit_desc: 限制下载速率。留空表示不限速。
download.skip_existing_desc: 不重复下载输出文件夹中已存在的文件。
download.section_output_desc: 文件保存位置和命名方式。
download.section_quality_desc: 默认视频质量和 yt-dlp 预设。
download.section_subtitles_desc: 与媒体一同保存的字幕、缩略图和元数据。
download.section_clipboard_hotkeys_desc: 粘贴检测和全局快捷键。
download.section_per_platform_desc: YouTube、课程和 Bilibili 的专属设置。
download.embed_metadata_desc: 将标题和作者信息写入下载的文件
download.embed_thumbnail_desc: 将专辑封面嵌入音频文件
download.clipboard_detection_desc: 自动检测复制到剪贴板的链接
download.auto_download_on_paste_desc: 检测到剪贴板中的 URL 时立即开始下载
download.organize_by_platform_desc: 将文件保存到以平台命名的子文件夹中
download.include_auto_subtitles_desc: 当没有人工字幕时，也下载 YouTube 自动生成的字幕（质量不稳定）
download.caption_locale_desc: 下载字幕时使用的语言（如有）。否则回退到源提供的语言。
download.keep_vtt_desc: 在转换后的 SRT 旁保留原始 WebVTT 文件。适用于需要原格式的播放器或脚本。
download.continuous_lecture_numbers_desc: 在模块之间连续编号课程（1、2、3…），而不是每个模块都重新开始。
download.bilibili_container_desc: 下载 Hi-Res FLAC 或杜比全景声时建议使用 MKV。MP4 兼容性最广。
download.bilibili_danmaku_desc: 在视频旁保存弹幕。需要先在 设置 → Cookies 中登录 Bilibili 账号。
download.bilibili_danmaku_format_desc: XML 是传统格式（兼容性最好）。ASS 会原生叠加在视频上。JSON 是原始数据。
download.bilibili_nfo_label: 生成 NFO 元数据（Kodi / Jellyfin / Emby）
download.bilibili_nfo_desc: 在每个下载旁保存 .nfo 文件，让媒体中心识别。系列内容会自动生成 tvshow.nfo + episode.nfo。
download.bilibili_cover_sidecar_label: 将封面保存为独立文件
download.bilibili_cover_sidecar_desc: 在嵌入封面之外，再单独保存视频海报。适合需要文件旁缩略图的媒体库。
download.bilibili_cover_format_desc: JPG 兼容性最佳。WebP/AVIF 文件更小。PNG 是无损格式。
download.bilibili_naming_desc: 按内容类型自定义下载文件的命名规则。使用 {变量} 占位符。斜杠会创建子文件夹。
download.bilibili_naming_bangumi_label: 番剧（动画 / 电影 / 剧集）
download.bilibili_naming_collection_label: UP 主 / 收藏夹 / 合集
download.bilibili_cdn_desc: 添加备用镜像主机，在默认 CDN 缓慢或被地区屏蔽时尝试。
download.bilibili_cdn_hosts_label: 备用主机（每行一个或逗号分隔）
download.bilibili_cdn_prefer_desc: 开启后会优先尝试备用主机。如果你所在地区默认 CDN 不稳定，请打开此选项。
download.translate_metadata_desc: 请求 YouTube 将标题和章节名本地化为应用语言（仅 YouTube）
download.youtube_sponsorblock_desc: 从 YouTube 视频中剪除广告、片头、片尾等赞助片段（社区数据；可能遗漏或误剪）
download.sb_mode_desc: 移除会从文件中剪掉这些片段。仅标记则添加章节标记，便于在播放器中跳过。
download.sb_categories_desc: 对哪些类型的片段生效。
download.split_by_chapters_desc: 当视频包含章节标记时，将每个章节保存为单独的文件
download.live_from_start_desc: 下载正在进行的直播时，从开头开始捕获，而不是从当前时刻
download.presets_desc: 一键应用常用配置。点击卡片即可应用。
download.preset_quality_desc: 最佳视频 · 元数据 · 缩略图
download.preset_music_only_desc: 音频 · ID3 标签 · 封面
download.hotkey_enabled_desc: 通过键盘快捷键下载剪贴板中的链接
download.music_hotkey_enabled_desc: Download clipboard URL as audio with a keyboard shortcut (uses Music Format below)
download.music_audio_format_desc: Audio format used by the music hotkey and the Music plugin downloader
download.copy_to_clipboard_on_hotkey: 快捷键下载后复制文件到剪贴板
download.copy_to_clipboard_on_hotkey_desc: 自动将下载的文件复制到剪贴板以便粘贴
download.filename_template_desc: yt-dlp 下载文件的输出模板

telegram.fix_file_extensions_desc: 根据文件类型添加正确的扩展名

typography.presets_desc: 经过测试的组合。一键应用字体 + 行高 + 间距。
typography.fonts_desc: 按家族单独选择。列表显示应用内置的字体（系统字体尚未支持）。
typography.line_height_desc: 行间垂直间距。值越大越宽松,长时间阅读更轻松。
typography.spacing_desc: 乘以间距标记 (padding、gap、margin)。1.0× 为默认。0.85× 紧凑整个 UI;1.25× 更宽松。
typography.preview_desc: 实时显示。遵循当前主题。
typography.preset_omniget_default_desc: Bricolage display、Inter body、Plex Mono。家用标准。
typography.preset_notion_like_desc: display + body 都用 Inter。通过大小+粗细体现层级,而非切换字体家族。
typography.preset_compact_desc: DM Sans + Inter,90% 间距。屏幕显示更多文字。
typography.preset_reading_desc: Bricolage + DM Sans,行高 1.7,110% 间距。适合长时间阅读。
typography.preset_tech_minimal_desc: 全部使用 Plex Mono。两极分化,适合喜欢的开发者。

advanced.title: 高级
advanced.max_concurrent_segments_desc: Parallel HLS segment fetches per stream. Leave default unless you know what you're doing.
advanced.concurrent_fragments_desc: 每个视频的并行分片下载数（yt-dlp）
advanced.max_retries_desc: How many times to retry a failed segment before giving up.
advanced.stagger_delay_desc: 启动并发下载之间的延迟时间
advanced.section_performance_desc: Concurrency, retries, and system behavior while downloading.
advanced.section_torrent_desc: BitTorrent listen port, trackers, and router port forwarding.
advanced.section_expert_desc: Browser cookies and User-Agent overrides. Most users should leave these empty.
advanced.section_debug_desc: Developer tools and diagnostics. Off by default.
advanced.reset_desc: Restore all settings to factory defaults.
advanced.reset_confirm: 确定要恢复吗？所有设置将被重置。
advanced.torrent_listen_port_desc: 用于接收 BitTorrent 连接的 TCP 端口
advanced.torrent_auto_trackers_desc: 改善 tracker 较少或失效的磁力链接的节点发现
advanced.torrent_upnp_desc: 让路由器接受入站节点连接以加快种子下载
advanced.prevent_sleep_desc: 有活动下载时阻止计算机进入睡眠
advanced.cookies_from_browser_desc: 仅在浏览器扩展无法工作时设置。大多数用户应保持为空。
advanced.user_agent_desc: 为下载发送自定义 User-Agent。留空则使用默认值。
advanced.twitter_manual_cookie_desc: 如果下载失败，您可以在此粘贴手动的 Cookie 标头并重试。不限于 Twitter/X。示例：sessionid=...; csrftoken=...; auth_token=...

rpc.title: Discord Rich Presence
rpc.desc: 在 Discord 个人资料上显示您的活动。切换活动时计时器不会重置。
rpc.enable: 在 Discord 上显示活动
rpc.privacy_note: 显示您正在听、看或读的内容。下载内容保持私密。
rpc.test_desc: 发送测试活动以验证 Discord 正在运行。
rpc.test_fail: 无法连接到 Discord。请确保 Discord 正在运行。
rpc.app_id_hint: Discord 应用 ID。如不确定请勿更改。
rpc.large_image_hint: 上传到 Discord 应用的资源名称。

bridge.title: 浏览器扩展
bridge.intro: 通过私有的本地连接将 OmniGet 浏览器扩展与此应用配对。打开扩展的选项页面，粘贴下方的端点 URL 与令牌，然后点击保存。
bridge.pair_hint: 在此点击一次，已安装的扩展会自动连接——无需复制粘贴。
bridge.pair_active: 窗口已开启——扩展将自动连接（剩余 {{secs}} 秒）。
bridge.rotate_hint: 生成新的令牌。已配对的浏览器需要更新其令牌。
bridge.copied_url: 端点 URL 已复制到剪贴板。
bridge.unavailable: 桥接不可用。请重启应用。

ai.title: AI 提供方
ai.provider_desc: 选择 AI 请求的去向。密钥仅本地保存，绝不记录。
ai.model_desc: 所选提供方的模型标识符。
ai.key_set: 已保存密钥。留空以保留。
ai.local_url_desc: 兼容 OpenAI 的基础 URL（Ollama、LM Studio 等）。
ai.summarize_hint: 获取视频字幕并进行总结。结果保存在下方。
ai.no_transcript: 此视频没有可用的字幕
ai.not_configured: 请先配置 AI 提供方
ai.history_clear_confirm: 清除所有 AI 历史？

channels.title: 已关注的频道
channels.add_hint: 后台检查新视频。自动下载默认关闭，需手动开启。
channels.empty_hint: 关注一个频道或播放列表，自动获取新视频。

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.intro: Manage your account cookies. Everything stays on your computer — nothing is sent to our servers.
cookies.managed_only_desc: 启用时，下载仅使用在此导入的 Cookie。如果某个域名没有受管理的 Cookie，下载将在无认证状态下继续，并记录到日志。关闭则回退到旧来源（手动头部、全局文件、浏览器提取）。
cookies.hint_use_extension: On any logged-in site, click the omniget extension icon in your browser. The cookies show up here in seconds.
cookies.empty_body: Use the browser extension to capture cookies from sites where you're logged in, or import a file manually.
cookies.import_paste_hint: Paste cookie contents in a modal
cookies.paste_modal_subtitle: Paste your cookie file contents — Netscape (yt-dlp) or JSON (Edit-This-Cookie) accepted.
cookies.modal_no_results: No cookies found with this filter.
cookies.add_generic_hint: For yt-dlp-supported sites not listed above.
cookies.confirm_clear_body: Cookies for {{domain}} go to the trash (recoverable for 24h). Continue?

bilibili.login_qr_subtitle: 打开哔哩哔哩 App 扫描下方二维码。
bilibili.login_qr_scanned: 已扫描，请在手机上确认。
bilibili.login_qr_expired: 二维码已过期，请重新生成。
bilibili.login_sms_sent: 短信已发送，请输入收到的验证码。
bilibili.login_webview_btn: 通过 Bilibili 页面登录

omnibox.batch_queued: 已添加 {{count}} 个下载到队列
omnibox.batch_file_title: 选择一个包含 URL 的 .txt 文件
omnibox.batch_file_empty: 文件中未找到有效的 URL
omnibox.formats_merge_note: 如果 FFmpeg 可用，视频格式 (V) 将自动与音频 (A) 合并。
omnibox.formats_playlist_note: 单视频格式选择器不适用于播放列表。上方的「质量」选项将应用于每个视频。
omnibox.timerange_hint: 使用 mm:ss 或 hh:mm:ss。留空则下载整个视频。
omnibox.schedule_hint: 留空则立即开始。可选的停止时间会在下载仍在进行时取消它。
omnibox.playlist_empty: 无法加载播放列表项目
omnibox.playlist_none_selected: 请至少选择一个项目进行下载
omnibox.torrent_selected: 已选择 {{total}} 个文件中的 {{selected}} 个
omnibox.torrent_none_selected: 请至少选择一个文件进行下载
omnibox.cookie_hint_stale: 该网站保存的 Cookie 正在变旧。
omnibox.cookie_hint_expired: 该网站保存的 Cookie 已过期——下载可能失败。
omnibox.external_url_ready: 已从 Chrome 扩展收到 URL

adv.args_hint: 每个 token 一个 flag，用空格分隔。包含空格的值请用引号包裹。
adv.templates_empty: 还没有保存的模板。在上面输入 flags 并点击保存以便下次复用。

debug.title: 调试信息
debug.description: 用于粘贴到错误报告中的环境详情。不包含任何敏感信息。
debug.copied: 调试信息已复制到剪贴板

about.debug_disabled_redirect: Debug page is hidden. Enable it in Settings → Advanced → Diagnostics.
about.description: 你的媒体下载器。开源且免费。
about.terms_text: OmniGet 按原样提供，不作任何保证。本应用方便你下载互联网上公开可用的内容，但我们对你下载的内容及其用途不承担任何责任。使用 OmniGet 即表示你同意上述条款。
about.legal_text: OmniGet 的个人使用受到巴西《刑法典》第 184 条第 4 款的支持，该条款规定：出于个人私用目的、单份复制、不以营利为目的的作品复制不构成犯罪。但这并不意味着你可以分发、转售或将下载的内容用于商业用途。民事领域的著作权法仍然适用。
about.responsibility_text: 你（用户）对使用 OmniGet 及通过其获取的内容负全责。请尊重著作权和各平台的服务条款。始终注明原创作者。不要将其用于任何非法或侵犯他人权利的商业用途。如果将内容用于教育目的，请注明来源。
about.mascot_text: Loop 是 OmniGet 的吉祥物，一个会实时对你的下载做出反应的可爱小生物。为了保护 Loop，这里有一些规则：你可以自由创作 Loop 的同人画作，但不可将其设计或图稿用于商业用途、用于你自己的项目，或修改和重新分发项目中的原始图稿。
about.license_text: OmniGet 是开源软件，采用 GPL-3.0 许可证。源代码托管在 GitHub 上。「OmniGet」名称、标志和 Loop 是项目商标，不受代码许可证约束。
about.star_description: 如果你喜欢这个项目，请给我们一个星标！
about.feature_platforms: 支持从 10 多个平台及通过 yt-dlp 支持 1000 多个平台下载：YouTube、Instagram、TikTok、Twitter/X、Reddit、Twitch、Pinterest、Vimeo、Bluesky、Telegram
about.feature_hotmart: 支持 Hotmart 课程下载，可登录获取视频、附件和描述
about.feature_progress: 实时下载进度，显示预计时间和速度
about.feature_mascot: Loop，会对你的下载做出反应的吉祥物
about.feature_themes: 11 个主题：Dark、Light、Catppuccin（4 种风味）、One Dark Pro、Dracula、NyxVamp（3 种变体）
about.feature_i18n: 支持英语、葡萄牙语、中文、日语、意大利语和法语
about.feature_tech: 使用 Tauri + Rust 构建，快速且轻量
about.roadmap_intro: 以下是 OmniGet 后续版本的规划。
about.roadmap_community_text: 我们欢迎意见和建议！这是请求新平台或功能的好方式。
about.roadmap_community_discord: 在 Discord 上联系我们：
about.roadmap_community_issue: 或在代码仓库中提交 Issue：

marketplace.title: 插件市场
marketplace.restart_required: 重启 OmniGet 以应用更改
marketplace.browse_error_hint: OmniGet 无法连接插件注册表。如果你的网络无法访问 GitHub，请在 设置 → 网络 中配置代理后重试。
marketplace.install_network_error: 无法连接 GitHub 下载该插件。请在 设置 → 网络 中配置代理后重试。
marketplace.plugin_install_hint: 从 Marketplace 安装此插件即可使用。
marketplace.plugin_restart_hint: 重启 OmniGet 以加载此插件。
marketplace.plugin_incompatible_title: 插件与当前版本不兼容
marketplace.plugin_incompatible_hint: 此插件是为旧版 OmniGet 构建的,无法加载。请从 Marketplace 重新安装以获取兼容版本——重启无法解决此问题。
marketplace.plugin_load_failed_hint: OmniGet 无法加载此插件。请尝试从 Marketplace 重新安装。

services.title: 支持 YouTube、Instagram 及 1000+ 网站
services.disclaimer: 可用性取决于各平台，可能有所不同
services.and_more: 以及 1000 多个其他平台

terms_note.agreement: 继续使用即表示你同意

convert.title: 转换
convert.empty: 未选择文件。请添加要转换的文件。
convert.hwaccel_none: 未检测到 GPU 加速
convert.no_ffmpeg: 未找到 FFmpeg。请安装 FFmpeg 以使用转换功能。

onboarding.welcome_desc: 我会帮你从互联网下载任何视频或课程。简单、快速、免费。
onboarding.folder_desc: 选择保存视频和课程的文件夹。
onboarding.deps_desc: 我需要一些工具才能正常工作。我可以自动安装所有工具！
onboarding.done_desc: 在搜索栏粘贴链接，见证奇迹。
onboarding.plugins_desc: 选择要安装的功能。你随时可以在 Marketplace 中添加或删除。
onboarding.hotkey_desc: 复制任何视频链接，按下快捷键，OmniGet 立即开始下载——即使最小化。
onboarding.rpc_desc: 在 Discord 个人资料中显示您正在使用 OmniGet — 包括您正在听、看或读的内容。
onboarding.rpc_privacy_note: 显示您正在听、看或读的内容。下载内容保持私密。

hints.omnibox: 在此粘贴你想要下载的视频或媒体链接。
hints.telegram: 连接你的 Telegram 账号，以便从频道和群组中下载媒体。
hints.hotkey: 全局快捷键：自动下载当前剪贴板中的链接。
hints.clipboard: 复制链接时自动检测链接并填入输入框。
hints.downloads_empty: 你的下载将显示在这里。前往首页开始下载。
hints.convert: 使用 FFmpeg 在不同格式之间转换媒体文件。

common.ytdlp_missing: 未安装 yt-dlp。请在设置中安装以启用下载功能。
common.cookie_error_message: 自动 Cookie 检测仅适用于 Firefox。Chrome、Edge 等基于 Chromium 的浏览器会阻止 Cookie 访问。解决方法：安装 Firefox 并登录您的账户，或从浏览器导出 cookies.txt 文件并在设置 > 下载 > Cookie 文件中配置。
common.cookie_file_hint: 使用浏览器扩展（如 'Get cookies.txt LOCALLY'）导出 Cookie，然后在此选择文件。Chrome/Edge 用户需要此功能进行需要登录的下载。

preview.no_account_hint: 登录 Bilibili 即可解锁 4K、HDR、Hi-Res 无损与杜比。
preview.premium_hint: 此处部分画质需要大会员订阅。

notice.session_expired_body: Bilibili 会话已过期。请重新登录以继续下载高品质内容。

bilibili.network_failed: 访问 Bilibili 时网络错误
bilibili.invalid_json: Bilibili 返回的数据格式无效
bilibili.rate_limited: Bilibili 限制请求 — 稍后再试
bilibili.premium_required: 需要大会员才能下载此画质

errors.login_required: 需要登录 — 请使用浏览器 Cookie 或尝试其他链接
errors.rate_limited: 请求过多 (429) — 请稍后再试
errors.access_denied: 访问被拒绝 (403) — 视频可能是私密的或受地区限制
errors.extraction_failed: 提取失败 — 请更新 yt-dlp 或重试
errors.connection_timeout: 连接超时 — 请检查网络
errors.ffmpeg_missing: 未找到 FFmpeg — 请在设置中安装
errors.unsupported_url: 不支持的 URL — 请检查链接
errors.page_access_failed: 无法访问该页面 — 请检查链接和连接
errors.no_formats: 此链接未找到视频格式
errors.cookie_database: 浏览器 Cookie 访问失败。下载将在没有身份验证的情况下继续。
errors.tiktok_blocked: TikTok 暂时屏蔽了请求。请几分钟后重试。
errors.download_timeout: 下载超时。请检查您的互联网连接。
errors.size_mismatch: 下载的文件大小不匹配。请重试。
errors.disk_full: 写入错误 — 您的磁盘可能已满。
errors.path_too_long: 下载文件夹路径过长 ({{current}}/{{limit}} 字符)。请选择更短的文件夹。
errors.console_encoding: Console encoding issue (non-UTF-8 locale). Update yt-dlp in Settings → Dependencies, or run "chcp 65001" in a terminal and reopen the app.
errors.extractor_broken: The site extractor is broken. Update yt-dlp in Settings → Dependencies, then retry.
errors.output_missing: 下载已完成，但文件夹中没有出现文件（或文件为空）。请检查磁盘空间和杀毒软件设置后重试。

debug.title: 调试
debug.enable_desc: 查看 OmniGet 在后台执行的操作
debug.report_copied: 诊断报告已复制到剪贴板
debug.no_entries: 暂无活动记录。开始下载即可在此查看事件。
debug.open_panel_desc: Opens the live activity log panel in About → Debug.

p2p.send_title: 通过 P2P 发送文件
p2p.send_description: 向另一位 OmniGet 用户发送文件。系统将生成一个共享码 — 接收方将其粘贴到输入框即可下载。
p2p.share_hint: 将此共享码发送给接收方
p2p.code_copied: 共享码已复制到剪贴板
p2p.receive_description: 有人想向你发送文件。接受后即可开始下载。

mascot.idle: 粘贴链接或搜索试试！|今天下载什么呢？|随时准备好了！
mascot.detecting: 嗯，让我看看...|正在分析链接...|稍等一下...
mascot.detected: 找到了！要开始下载吗？|发现了！走起？|一切就绪！
mascot.preparing: 正在准备中...|快好了...|正在整理你的下载...
mascot.search: 看看我找到了什么！|来看看吧！|看看这些！
mascot.error: 哎呀，出了点问题。再试一次？|没成功，再来一次？|嗯，出了点故障...
mascot.complete: 搞定了！|下载完成！|给你搞定了！
mascot.amazed: Wow, your first download! 🎉|There it is — your first one!|Saved! Welcome aboard!
mascot.downloading: 正在下载...|努力中！|正在获取文件...
mascot.stalled: 嗯，有点慢...|稍等，还在下...|网速好像有点慢...
mascot.queue: 排队等待中...|耐心点，快了...|马上就轮到你了！

courses.title: 课程
courses.update_plugin_hint: 请更新课程插件以获得最佳体验。
courses.update_plugin_for_platform: 此平台需要更新课程插件。请在市场中检查更新。
courses.browser_hint: 将打开一个浏览器窗口供您登录。登录后，您的会话将被自动检测。
courses.otp_check_email: 请检查您的邮箱获取验证码。

hotmart.title: Hotmart
hotmart.captcha_detected: 检测到验证码 — 请在登录窗口中完成验证。

udemy.title: Udemy
udemy.waiting_code: 一个 6 位验证码已发送到您的邮箱，请在登录窗口中输入。
udemy.cookies_instructions: 如需登录 Udemy Business/企业版账号（如 company.udemy.com），请使用浏览器扩展（如「Get cookies.txt locally」）将 Cookies 导出为 JSON 格式，然后粘贴或加载文件。

about.long_pitch: Studying isn't just PDFs. It's books, podcasts, lessons, scribbled notes in between. omniget bundles all of it — without losing your flow switching windows.

hub.title: 学习
hub.subtitle: 把下载的课程变成刻意练习的循环。

search.placeholder: 搜索课程、课时、笔记、闪卡...
search.no_results: 没有与 "{{term}}" 匹配的结果
search.hint: 按 Ctrl+K 打开 · Esc 关闭

music.title: Music
music.subtitle: Your tracks, albums and playlists.
music.favorites_empty: Nothing favorited yet. Mark a track to start.
music.clear_covers_hint: Wipes the cover cache and forces re-extraction on next scan
music.clear_covers_confirm: Delete all cached covers? Next scan will re-extract them.
music.diagnostics_hint: Shows current cover state (paths, sizes, counts) — useful when thumbs don't show
music.empty_no_roots_body: Point to a folder with your audio files. MP3, FLAC, M4A, OGG, OPUS — all common formats. Nothing is copied or moved.
music.empty_no_tracks_body: Folders are configured but we haven't scanned yet. Click below to index your tracks.
music.shelf_continue_empty: 这里没有未完成的内容。播放些什么,以后回来继续。
music.shelf_recent_empty: 你的播放记录从下一首开始。
music.diag_metrics_empty: 暂无数据。播放几首曲子来积累遥测数据吧。
music.diag_loop_missing_hint: 在浏览器中安装 Loop 扩展,并将 cookies 导出到所示路径。
music.diag_loop_no_youtube: 文件存在但没有 YouTube cookies。
music.diag_loop_no_youtube_hint: 用安装了 Loop 扩展的浏览器打开 youtube.com 并登录,cookies 会自动出现在这里。
music.shelf_recent_albums_empty: 在菜单中指定一个音乐文件夹来扫描你的专辑。
music.explore_youtube_cta_body: 发现、排行榜、新发布和订阅。
music.history_empty_title: 你的播放记录从你播放的第一首开始
music.playlist_loading_error: 无法加载这个播放列表。
music.album_empty: 这张专辑没有可用的曲目。
music.my_playlists_subtitle: 你用 YouTube 视频整理的本地列表。
music.my_playlists_empty_body: 创建一个吧 — 数据只留在本地。
music.my_playlists_delete_confirm_body: {{count}} 个视频仍然在 YouTube 上 — 仅本地的列表消失。
music.my_playlists_delete_confirm_empty: 本地列表会消失。无法撤销。
music.remove_from_playlist_aria: 把 {{title}} 从播放列表移除
music.add_to_playlist_search_short: 请输入至少 2 个字符。
music.empty_search_no_results: No matching tracks — try another search.
music.normalization_hint: Match perceived loudness across tracks (uses YouTube loudnessDb when available).
music.skip_silence_hint: Auto-skip silent passages longer than 1.5s. Useful for podcasts.
music.listen_together_intro: Share what you're listening to in real time with a friend. Connect to a WebSocket relay and create or join a room with a short code.
music.listen_together_relay_hint: Your own ws:// or wss:// relay (see omniget-listen-relay).
music.genres_subtitle: Browse by music genre detected in your files.
music.no_genres: No genres found. Tracks need a genre tag.
music.activity_subtitle: What you listened, when, how much.
music.no_activity: No activity in this period yet. Play some tracks to start seeing stats.
music.lyrics_lrclib_hint: Lyrics from lrclib.net (community synced lyrics database). May not exist for obscure tracks.
music.lyrics_error_hint: Music keeps playing — you can try again anytime
music.lyrics_paste_placeholder: Paste the contents of a .lrc file here
music.lyrics_paste_hint: Accepts LRC format with [mm:ss.xx] timestamps. At least one synced line is required.
music.lyrics_paste_invalid: No timestamped lines found — check the format
music.lyrics_translation_no_translator_hint: Open Settings → Music → Lyrics to pick a translator
music.lyrics_translation_error: Translation failed — you can try again
music.player_error_track_unavailable: Track was pulled from the source.
music.player_error_format_unavailable: This video needs YouTube login. Open youtube.com in a browser with the Loop extension and sign in to your account.
music.translation_settings_libretranslate_url_: e.g. http://localhost:5000 — leave empty to disable
music.translation_settings_deepl_key_hint: Get one at deepl.com/account. Free tier covers ~150 lyrics/month
music.ytdlp_subtitle: Paste a URL (YouTube, SoundCloud, Bandcamp, anything yt-dlp supports). Will convert to audio in your library.
music.ytdlp_missing_body: Install yt-dlp and make sure it's on your system PATH (https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp). On Windows: winget install yt-dlp.yt-dlp.
music.video_mode_only_youtube: Video only available for YouTube tracks
music.info_no_track: Play a track to see details
music.lastfm_intro: Connect your Last.fm account to scrobble what you play. You'll need to create a free API app.
music.lastfm_step1_desc: Go to Last.fm and create an application. You'll get an API key and a shared secret.
music.lastfm_step2_desc: Paste the API key and shared secret from the app you created.
music.lastfm_step3_desc: Opens Last.fm in your browser to approve. Then come back and click Finalize.
music.lastfm_authorize_pending: Approve access on the Last.fm page that opened, then click Finalize:
music.lastfm_connected_hint: Tracks played for over 30s scrobble to your account. Now playing updates in real time.
music.dl_hero_sub: YouTube, SoundCloud, Bandcamp, anything yt-dlp supports. Becomes audio in your library.
music.dl_idle_hint: Paste a track or album URL, or search by title. Ctrl+V auto-detects.
music.dl_unsupported: Site not recognized. Try pasting the direct track URL.
music.music_theme_subtitle: Customize music section colors. Saved separately from the global app theme.
music.music_theme_reduce_motion_hint: Disables transitions and animations in the music section, independent of the global system setting.
music.youtube_error_generic: 与 YouTube 通信时出错
music.now_playing_queue_empty: Queue is empty — click any track to start.
music.now_playing_previous_empty: Nothing played in this session yet.
music.rpc_intro: Shows what you're listening to on your Discord profile. Needs Discord open on the machine.
music.rpc_appid_hint: Application ID from your Discord Developer Portal app. Default is the omniget "Loop" app.
music.rpc_image_hint: Asset name (Rich Presence Assets) uploaded on Discord Dev Portal. Without it, activity shows without icon.
music.rpc_test_fail: Failed (Discord not running or invalid app ID)
music.rpc_discord_running: Discord must be running on the machine (desktop client, not browser).
music.rpc_show_cover_hint: When on, the current track's cover shows as the large image. Local covers only render if you have the asset uploaded to Discord Dev Portal.
music.rpc_show_buttons_hint: Adds two buttons: "Play now" (opens the track at its source) and "View on GitHub".
music.rpc_update_interval_hint: Update frequency during playback. Min 2s, max 30s. Discord rate-limits to 5 updates/20s.
music.yt_subtitle: Import playlists from YouTube and YouTube Music. Streams on demand — no download.
music.yt_intro: Paste any YouTube or YouTube Music playlist link. For private playlists (including "Likes"), point to the browser you're logged into.
music.yt_step1_title: Which browser to pull cookies from?
music.yt_step1_desc: For private playlists and your Library, omniget needs cookies from the browser you're signed into. Without cookies, only public playlists work.
music.yt_browser_micro: yt-dlp reads cookies straight from your browser. Nothing leaves your machine — it's all local.
music.yt_step2_desc: Paste the link, omniget imports the track list. Playback streams on demand — nothing is downloaded.
music.yt_empty_body: Hook up a YouTube or YouTube Music playlist to see your tracks here alongside your local files.
music.yt_remove_confirm: Remove this playlist from your library? (The YouTube playlist stays intact.)
music.yt_search_placeholder: Search YouTube Music — songs, artists, albums…
music.sc_signin_body: Sign in to SoundCloud in your browser — the OmniGet extension grabs the cookies automatically. Then come back and refresh.
music.sc_import_url_desc: Paste any link to a track, playlist or artist — we'll figure out the rest.
music.sc_import_invalid: That doesn't look like a SoundCloud URL.
music.sc_section_continue: Pick up where you left off
music.sc_go_plus_unavailable_hint: Higher quality streams require a SoundCloud Go+ account. Standard MP3 still works without it.
music.sc_empty_likes_body: Hearts you give on SoundCloud show up here.
music.sc_empty_playlists_body: Create or import a playlist on soundcloud.com — it'll show here on next refresh.
music.sc_offline_for_focus: Save offline so it plays even with no internet
music.yt_auth_desc: To pull your private library (Likes, your playlists), paste 2 cookies from the browser where you're logged into YouTube Music.
music.yt_auth_step1: Open music.youtube.com in Chrome/Edge/Firefox where you're logged in.
music.yt_auth_step3: Copy the value of __Secure-3PAPISID and paste in the first field.
music.yt_auth_step4: In Network tab, click any request, copy the whole Cookie: header and paste in the second field.
music.yt_cookie_hint: Paste the entire Cookie: header from any request to music.youtube.com.
music.yt_sync_desc: Imports Liked Music + all your playlists in one batch. Runs in the background. Tracks show up in Library / Albums / Artists alongside your local files.
music.yt_ext_hint: Pulls YouTube cookies straight from the omniget browser extension. No F12, no copy-paste.
music.yt_ext_empty: No cookies captured yet. Open music.youtube.com in your browser with the omniget extension active, then try again.
music.yt_ext_no_sapisid: Cookies found but no __Secure-3PAPISID. Sign in to YouTube Music and try again.
music.yt_ext_no_file: Cookie file doesn't exist. Extension never sent anything — check: (1) omniget host running, (2) extension active, (3) Native Messaging registered. Expected at: {{path}}
music.yt_ext_no_youtube: File exists ({{age}}) but only has cookies for: {{domains}}. Open music.youtube.com in browser, wait 3s, try again.
music.yt_ext_no_sapisid_detail: {{count}} cookies imported ({{age}}) but none is __Secure-3PAPISID. Sign in to YouTube Music.
music.quality_intro: Pick how downloaded music is encoded. You can change anytime — this only affects new downloads.
music.quality_hint_mp3_128: Smallest files · ~3 MB per song · basic quality
music.quality_hint_mp3_192: Balanced · ~5 MB per song · plays everywhere
music.quality_hint_mp3_320: MP3 at max · ~7 MB per song · maximum compatibility
music.quality_hint_aac_192: Sounds great, small files, plays everywhere · ~5 MB per song
music.quality_hint_aac_256: Premium lossy · ~6 MB per song · transparent quality
music.quality_hint_opus_160: Most efficient · ~4 MB per song · may not play on older devices
music.quality_hint_flac_cd: Lossless CD quality · ~30 MB per song
music.quality_hint_flac_hires: Studio quality · 24-bit/96 kHz · ~80 MB per song
music.quality_hint_wav: Uncompressed PCM · ~50 MB per song · largest files
music.sources_intro: When you ask omniget to fetch a song by name, it tries these sources in order. Drag with arrows to reorder.
music.qobuz_intro: Connect your Qobuz account to get lossless tracks (FLAC up to 24-bit/192 kHz). Requires an active Qobuz subscription.
music.qobuz_privacy: Stored locally on your device only. Never sent to omniget servers.
music.qobuz_connected_hint: Qobuz is now in the source pool. Use the Sources panel to control its priority.
music.sidebar_hint_body: Music keeps playing while you navigate between Courses, Notes and other sections.
music.playlists_empty_body: Create a playlist to group your favorite tracks and listen in sequence.
music.playlist_empty_body: Add tracks via the ⊕ menu on any track row.
music.delete_confirm_msg: Playlist "{{name}}" will be deleted. Tracks remain in your library.
music.refresh_covers_body: We'll fetch one cover per track from YouTube for the {{count}} tracks in this playlist. Should take a few seconds.
music.refresh_covers_hint: Existing covers for tracks with a known YouTube ID will be replaced.
music.transcode_lead: Convert a folder of downloaded videos into audio files. Each output keeps the per-video thumbnail as cover.
music.search_hint: Type a track title, artist or album.
music.roots_hint: Folders we scan for audio. Disable one to ignore without deleting from disk. Removing here does not delete any file.
music.roots_empty: You haven't added any music folder yet.
music.local_search_hint: 输入标题、艺人或专辑名以搜索您的本地音乐库。
music.history_unplayable: 无法播放此条目 — 曲目已不可用。
music.history_clear_confirm_yt: 这将清除您所有的 YouTube 历史记录。继续吗？
music.history_clear_confirm_local: 这将清除您所有的本地历史记录。继续吗？
music.history_empty_title_yt: 在 YouTube 上播放内容后,历史记录将出现在这里
music.history_empty_title_local: 播放音乐库中的内容后,历史记录将出现在这里

youtube.shelf_charts_empty: 现在无法获取榜单,稍后再试。
youtube.shelf_new_releases_empty: 目前没有新发布。明天再来看看。
youtube.moods_empty: 情绪暂时无法加载,稍后再试。
youtube.shelf_trending_error: 现在无法连接 YouTube,几分钟后再试。
youtube.shelf_quick_picks_empty: 我们还在学习你的喜好。先播放几首歌开始吧。
youtube.shelf_daily_discover_empty: 播放一首你喜欢的,我们会推荐接下来可能想听的。
youtube.shelf_continue_watching_empty: 暂时没有可继续的内容。播放一些来开始。
youtube.shelf_subscriptions_empty: 关注一个频道，新视频会显示在这里。
youtube.mood_loading_error: 无法加载这个情绪。重试。
youtube.mood_empty: 这个情绪暂时没有歌单。稍后再来。
youtube.hub_tagline: YouTube 音乐和视频集中在一处。
youtube.search_hint: 开始输入以查找视频、频道和播放列表。
youtube.connect_title: 连接您的 YouTube 账户
youtube.connect_body: 连接后,您的音乐库、订阅和未看完的内容将显示在这里。不登录时仅搜索和发现可用(匿名)。
youtube.connect_step_missing: 在浏览器中安装 Loop 扩展程序,并将 cookies 导出到下方路径。回到这里 — 应用会自动检测。
youtube.connect_step_no_youtube: Loop 已安装,但您还未在浏览器中登录 YouTube。打开 youtube.com 并登录 — cookies 将自动出现在这里。
youtube.connect_footnote: Cookies 保留在您的电脑上 — 不会发送到我们的服务器。

music.spotify_auth_waiting: 正在浏览器中等待授权。授权完成后请返回此处。
music.spotify_play_via_yt: 通过 YouTube 播放(免费模式)

library.title: 课程库
library.subtitle: Your courses, videos and PDFs in one place.
library.empty_browse_description: Point to your course folders or import videos from Telegram. Nothing is copied or moved.
library.empty_add_folder_desc: Point to where your courses already are. No copy, no move.
library.empty_telegram_desc: Download videos straight from channels you've joined.
library.delete_confirm_msg_folder: The folder "{{name}}" and everything inside will be moved to the system Trash.
library.delete_confirm_msg_file: "{{name}}" will be moved to the system Trash.
library.roots_button_hint: Folders the library scans for courses and videos
library.empty_with_roots_one: Detected 1 configured folder but no courses indexed yet.
library.empty_with_roots_other: Detected {{count}} configured folders but no courses indexed yet.
library.root_missing_hint: Drive unplugged? Folder deleted? Reconnect or remove here.
library.selection_delete_confirm_msg: Items will be moved to the system Trash. You can restore from there if you change your mind.
library.empty: 尚未索引任何课程。请从设置中运行扫描。
library.error_loading_notes: Couldn't load your notes. Try reloading or contact support if it persists.
library.health_ok: 一切都在它该在的地方。
library.health_zero_byte_hint: 这些未完成下载。重新下载课程,或删除空文件并重新扫描。
library.health_missing_hint: 数据库中有记录但磁盘上没有 — 通常是在应用外被移动或删除。清理仅在课程文件夹仍存在时移除条目,因此未挂载的驱动器是安全的。
library.health_orphan_hint: 有说明文字但无视频的文件夹。通常是已抓取但未下载的"免费预览",或扫描器跳过的纯文本课程。
library.tags_hint: 点击 → 包含 · Shift+点击 → 排除
library.cleanup_confirm_message: Will remove {{count}} lesson(s) whose video file no longer exists on disk. Courses whose entire folder is gone are preserved (likely an unmounted drive). Courses left with no lessons are removed too. No files are deleted from disk.
library.cleanup_done: {{lessons}} lesson(s) removed · {{courses}} course(s) removed · {{kept}} preserved (unmounted drive)
library.cleanup_force_hint: Use this if you renamed/deleted folders intentionally. WARNING: disconnected external drives will be wiped too.
library.cleanup_force_confirm_message: Will remove ALL {{count}} entries, INCLUDING courses whose entire folder no longer exists on disk. Use only if you're sure folders were renamed/deleted and this isn't a disconnected external drive. Orphan courses are removed too. No files are deleted from disk.
library.notes_no_open_page: No page open. Create or select one in the sidebar.
library.no_platforms: Set a platform on a course to filter here.
library.roots_hint: Toggle folders on or off to include them in scans.
library.browse_empty_roots: Add a folder to get started.

telegram.plugin_missing_body: Install the Telegram plugin from the marketplace to access your chats here.
telegram.coming_soon: Telegram browser coming soon — auth is wired up.

auth.title: Connect Telegram
auth.subtitle: Sign in to browse your chats and media.
auth.qr_hint_scan: Open Telegram › Settings › Devices › Link Desktop Device

telegram.chats_subtitle: Open a chat to browse its media.
telegram.chat_empty: No media of this type in this chat.
telegram.folder_autoscan_desc: Find channels marked with [og] in title or [telegram-drive-folder] in description.
telegram.favorites_empty: No favorites yet. Star items inside a chat to pin them here.
telegram.smart_empty: No favorites match this folder. Star items to populate it.
telegram.flood_wait_hint: Telegram asked us to wait before more requests
telegram.list_trimmed_hint: Showing first {{shown}} of {{total}} chats. Use search to find specific ones.
telegram.auto_resume_downloads_hint: On app start, resume downloads that were in progress.
telegram.player_not_playable: This media type can't be played inline.
telegram.player_kbd_hint: Esc close · J/↓ next · K/↑ previous
telegram.allow_remote_delete_hint: Lets the bulk delete button erase messages from Telegram. Off by default.
telegram.move_needs_delete_perm: Enable "Allow remote delete" in settings to move (move = copy + delete original).
telegram.delete_confirm_body: {{n}} messages will be deleted from Telegram. Cannot be undone.
telegram.player_book_hint: PDF/EPUB — download to read in the embedded reader.
telegram.create_folder_hint: Creates a private Telegram channel marked as a course folder.
telegram.chats_empty_hint: Create your first folder to start hosting courses on Telegram.
telegram.folder_delete_body: The Telegram channel will be removed permanently along with all uploads. Cannot be undone.

library.home_continue_title: 从上次离开的地方继续
library.home_continue_empty: 还没有进行中的课程。开始一节课就会出现在这里。
library.home_empty_desc: 添加一个包含课程的文件夹开始。

player.title: 播放器
player.placeholder: 从课程库选择一个课时开始。

lesson.no_video: 磁盘上找不到视频文件。
lesson.autoplay_last: 您已完成最后一个课时。

notes.title: 笔记
notes.placeholder: 学习时记下的笔记会显示在这里。
notes.empty: 还没有笔记。在观看课时时做一条吧。
notes.quick_placeholder: {{time}} 处的快速笔记 — 按 Enter 保存
notes.quick_note_hint: 观看时按 N 可在当前时间点捕获笔记。
notes.select_or_new: Select a note or create a new one.
notes.delete_body: The note will be removed permanently. Cannot be undone.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Local XP — no leaderboard, no social comparison
achievements.history_empty: Nothing here yet. Study something to start earning XP.
achievements.reset_desc: Clears XP, achievements, and counters. Does not affect course progress.
achievements.reset_confirm_message: XP, level, achievements, and counters will be cleared. This action cannot be undone.
achievements.desc_xp_10000: 累积一万 XP — 你很专注
achievements.desc_focus_6000: 累积 6000 分钟专注 — 罕见的自律

focus.title: 专注
focus.placeholder: 番茄钟和深度工作会话在此进行。
focus.intent_hint: Shows up on your Discord if RPC is on. Leave empty if you'd rather not.
focus.no_session: 没有正在进行的会话。选择一个预设开始。
focus.history_empty: 还没有会话。开始一次以建立连续记录。

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.unsupported: Notifications not supported in this browser

focus.hero_subtitle: Pick a subject and a preset to begin.
focus.page_subtitle: Focused sessions with Pomodoro or deep work
focus.stop_body: The session will be marked as interrupted and won't count towards stats.
focus.acc_cycles_summary: {{focus}}分钟专注 · {{break}}分钟休息 · {{cycles}}× 直到长休息

progress.title: 进度
progress.placeholder: 连续天数、每日活动与里程碑。
progress.no_data: No progress yet — watch a lesson to get started.
progress.heatmap_empty: 尚无活动。完成一个课时将其点亮。
progress.heatmap_hint: Last {{n}} days · click for daily notes
progress.chart_time_per_course_empty: 本周期内没有时间记录。
progress.chart_subject_empty: 创建学科并分配会话以查看细分。
progress.retention_stub_before: 真实的保留率将来自 Anki 跨数据库查询。目前请打开
progress.retention_stub_after: 查看保留率、间隔分布和复习历史。

settings.title: 设置
settings.placeholder: 插件首选项与课程库重新扫描。
settings.rescan_desc: 再次扫描下载文件夹，刷新课程、模块和课时。
settings.rescan_done: 在 {{ms}} 毫秒内找到 {{courses}} 个课程和 {{lessons}} 个课时。
settings.export_desc: 下载包含课程、笔记、闪卡、进度和专注历史的 JSON 快照。
settings.import_desc: 从先前导出的 JSON 文件恢复。ID 匹配的现有行将被覆盖。
settings.import_replace: 导入前清空当前数据（破坏性操作）
settings.import_done: 已导入 {{courses}} 个课程、{{lessons}} 个课时、{{notes}} 条笔记、{{flashcards}} 张闪卡。

read.title: Read
read.subtitle: Library of books, PDFs and documents.
read.empty: No books yet. Add folders and click Rescan.
read.soon: Reader under construction. For now, files open in the default app.
read.unsupported_format: Format {{format}} is not yet supported in the internal reader. Use 'Open in default app'.
read.bookmarks_empty: No bookmarks. Press B to mark current page.
read.highlights_empty: Select text on the page and pick a color.
read.export_pdf_ok: Annotated PDF · {{highlights}} highlights · {{bookmarks}} bookmarks · {{notes}} notes · {{inks}} inks
read.bulk_export_hint: Export markdown v2 for every book into a folder
read.roots_hint: Choose where to look for books. Scanner walks these folders recursively and ignores dotfolders.
read.roots_empty: No folders yet. Add one below.
read.empty_no_roots_hint: Add a folder with books to start scanning. Courses and books use separate roots.
read.delete_book_confirm: “{{title}}”将从磁盘永久删除并从书库中移除。此操作无法撤销。
read.delete_book_done_missing: 文件已不存在——“{{title}}”已从书库移除
read.enrich_search_hint: Looks up by current title + author. Picks best match from OpenLibrary.
read.collections_hint: Group books across folders. Open a collection from the dropdown above to add or remove books.
read.collection_delete_confirm: Delete collection "{{name}}"? Books stay; only the grouping is removed.
read.manga_subtitle: Manga, manhwa, manhua, webtoons and other Japanese-style serialized comics.
read.series_empty_hint: Add folders with CBZ/CBR files or unpacked chapter folders, then scan.
read.clean_orphans_hint: Remove DB rows pointing to files that no longer exist or that became series chapters.
read.orphans_cleared: Removed {{missing}} missing · {{member}} now in manga · {{junk}} junk (LICENSE/README/tiny)
read.manga_clean_orphans_hint: Remove local series whose folder no longer exists.
read.manga_clear_remote_confirm: Delete all manga tracked from MangaDex? Local series stay.
read.manga_clear_all_confirm: Delete every manga from the library, including local? This cannot be undone.
read.entry_empty: No pages found in this chapter.
read.discover_subtitle: Search MangaDex and add to your library.
read.book_discover_subtitle: Search public domain libraries and download free ebooks straight into your library.
read.book_borrow_only_hint: This book is under Controlled Digital Lending. Free download is not available; borrowing requires an archive.org account.
read.annas_subtitle: Shadow-library metasearch. Disabled by default. Jurisdiction-dependent.
read.annas_warning_body1: Alt Library aggregates mirrors of LibGen, Z-Library, Sci-Hub and other shadow libraries. Material there may be copyrighted.
read.annas_warning_body2: The legality of accessing, downloading or distributing that content varies per country. In some jurisdictions (Palau, for example) personal use is permitted; in others it is not. You are solely responsible for checking your own laws.
read.annas_warning_body3: omniget-study merely provides a programmable HTTP client. Enabling this source downloads content that YOU chose to request. Keep your own compliance.
read.annas_not_acked: Warning not yet acknowledged — enabling requires confirmation.
read.annas_log_hint: Optional local log of which domains/mirrors each download used. Stored locally only.
read.annas_domains_hint: One per line. Try in order on each request. Reset to clear to defaults.
read.annas_reset_hint: Clears acknowledgement, disables source, restores default domains. Does NOT remove already-downloaded files.
read.annas_reset_confirm: Reset all Alt Library settings? Source will be disabled and require re-acknowledgement.
read.annas_warning_modal_line2: Most content there is copyrighted. Downloading it may be legal in your jurisdiction, grey-area, or outright illegal — verify with your local laws.
read.annas_warning_modal_line3: omniget-study does not host content. All downloads go through mirrors YOU configure and YOU trigger.
read.annas_warning_modal_line4: Tick the box below if you understand and accept personal responsibility for your usage.
read.annas_warning_ack_label: I understand. I take full responsibility for my use in my jurisdiction.
read.enrich_no_results: 无结果。请先尝试编辑书籍标题。

empty.library_hint: Download a course via Courses plugin or set the folder in Settings.
empty.notes_hint: Create a note during playback or via Ctrl+Shift+N.
empty.subjects_hint: Add subjects to distribute weekly goals.

maintenance.title: {{feature}} 维护中
maintenance.lead: 我们正在打磨这个区域。Study 的其他部分正常工作 — 此部分将很快回归。
maintenance.detail_notes: 块编辑器 (Tiptap)、反向链接、图谱视图和模板仍在打磨中。
maintenance.detail_anki: 内置 Anki 客户端 (FSRS-5、同步、.apkg) 正在最后完善中。
maintenance.detail_focus: 番茄钟、专注历史和 Discord 状态正在重做。
maintenance.detail_progress: 图表、连续记录和每周目标正在重建以确保准确性。
maintenance.detail_achievements: 经验、徽章和成就树仍在打磨中。
maintenance.home_banner_title: Study 的部分功能正在维护
maintenance.home_banner_body: 专注、进度、成就和笔记暂时不可用，我们正在打磨它们。OmniGet 的其他功能正常运行。

tracking.title: 包裹追踪
tracking.subtitle_empty: 追踪巴西主要承运商的包裹。
tracking.search_placeholder: 按编码、别名或状态搜索…

empty.none_desc: 添加追踪编码即可跟进配送进度。

remove_dialog.title: 删除包裹
remove_dialog.question: 确定要删除 {{name}} 吗？
remove_dialog.sub: 追踪事件也会一并删除。

archive_prompt.title: 包裹已送达 🎉
archive_prompt.body: 要归档这个包裹吗？它会离开活动列表,但历史记录会保留。

settings.title: 设置
settings.subtitle: 包裹跟踪的通知偏好。
settings.notifications_hint: 当包裹进入新阶段（例如派送中、已送达）时，发送系统通知。
settings.permission_denied_toast: 系统级别已禁用通知。请在操作系统设置中启用。
settings.permission_denied_hint: 请在操作系统设置中允许 Omniget 发送通知，以接收包裹更新。

notification.test_body: 包裹状态变化时，您将看到此类通知。
